name: Risk Parity
description: Risk Parity optimising equal marginal risk contribution across all 13 assets: global equities (VUSA, EQQQ, AIGC, IIND, IMEU, IWRD), precious metals (SSLN, SGLN), commodities (COMM, BRNT, CRUD, WCOA), and bonds (VUTY). Directly solves the equal risk contribution problem without hierarchical clustering.
